chart.title: Plastic waste accumulated in the oceans
chart.subtitle: The amount of plastic waste that has accumulated in the oceans since 1951. This is calculated as the running total of plastic flowing into the ocean each year.
chart.note: Regional definitions adhere to those specified by the [OECD](#dod:oecd-regions).
